cyberware.name: Chrome Arm Mk.I
cyberware.flavor: Servo-driven forearm. Dents street signs on a bad day.

cyberware.name: Razor Claws
cyberware.flavor: Retractable monofilament blades. Illegal in six districts.

cyberware.name: Optic Scanner
cyberware.flavor: Threat ID overlay, night vision, mild headaches.

cyberware.name: Target-Lock Eyes
cyberware.flavor: Military surplus. Tracks micro-movements you can't even see.

cyberware.name: Spinal Brace
cyberware.flavor: Shock-absorbing lattice welded to your vertebrae.

cyberware.name: Reflex Booster
cyberware.flavor: Cuts reaction time in half. Makes your handwriting worse.

cyberware.name: Synth-Derm
cyberware.flavor: Flawless, poreless, faintly iridescent under neon.

cyberware.name: Mirrorskin
cyberware.flavor: Reflective subdermal weave. People remember your silhouette, not your face.
